channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer criticises ‘disgraceful’ attacks on police after 11 injured in disorder over Nowak murder – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer criticises ‘disgraceful’ attacks on police after 11 injured in disorder over Nowak murder – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at ‘disgraceful’ violence in Southampton and calls for ‘serious work, not rage’
item.description: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at ‘disgraceful’ violence in Southampton and calls for ‘serious work, not rage’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Watch live: Starmer grilled at PMQs after violent clashes over Henry Nowak death

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Cost of living and high street among top priorities for Makerfield voters, poll shows
item.description: Cost of living and high street among top priorities for Makerfield voters, poll shows

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Police anti-racism guidance ‘gives wrong impression’, minister admits after Henry Nowak murder

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): David Cameron offered Boris Johnson senior cabinet role if he agreed not to push for Brexit

item.title: The Times: Henry Nowak case: police racism guidance ‘wrong’, says minister - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The one person who should be in the Mandelson files – but barely features
